name: vmaf_tiny_fastdvdnet_pre_v1
notes: FastDVDnet temporal pre-filter — real upstream weights (Tassano, Delon, Veit 2020; MIT) wrapped by a luma adapter (Y->[Y,Y,Y] tiling, sigma=25/255 noise map, RGB->Y BT.601 collapse). 5-frame window [t-2, t-1, t, t+1, t+2] -> denoised frame t. T6-7b. See docs/ai/models/fastdvdnet_pre.md.
